prompt.content:
Calculate using the model the difference between the implied share price for S&P Global from the DCF valuation (using the growth-in-perpetuity method to determine terminal value) and S&P Global’s closing share price as of 12/31/2025, under the following assumptions:
•	Hold subscription revenue growth constant at 10.0% from 2026 through 2030.
•	Set the risk‑free rate equal to the 1‑month U.S. Treasury yield as of December 31, 2025.

Present the result in USD, rounded to the nearest dollar.

rubrics.name: States that difference between the implied share price from the DCF valuation... (ver_6a32692cec8d4953957c327af810a9f5)

messages.content: States that difference between the implied share price from the DCF valuation (using the growth-in-perpetuity method to determine terminal value) and S&P Global’s closing share price as of 12/31/2025 is ($20) (acceptable range 11.9 to 12.1).

golden_responses.golden_text_response: Difference between the implied share price from the DCF valuation (using the growth-in-perpetuity method to determine terminal value) and S&P Global’s closing share price as of 12/31/2025 is ($20).
